comment: 1.22 only: galena nugget crushes 1:1 to crushed-galena (EM absent). On 1.20/1.21 the crushed variant is 'leadoxide' instead, handled by nugget-crushing-galena-legacy.json; the build ships only the matching file per game version. The quantity field is REQUIRED: vanilla CollectibleObject.GetHeldItemInfo reads crushingProps.Quantity.avg with no null-check, so omitting it NREs every tooltip (and breaks the pulverizer).
